nodes.title: Negative Prompt
widgets_values: camera movement, zoom, pan, tracking shot, parallax, dolly, background motion, scene change, character turning, rotating, flipping, mirror flip, facing camera, scale change, position drift, floating away, morphing, melting, warping, extra limbs, missing limbs, duplicated character, deformed body, blurry, low quality, flicker, strobing, color shift, text, watermark, mouth, teeth, lips, nose, nostrils, eyebrows, ears, facial features, face, smiling, talking, opening mouth, tongue, extra eyes, eyelashes

nodes.title: Framing Prompt
widgets_values: Static locked-off camera, fixed frame, no zoom, pan, or tracking. The character stays at constant scale and screen position. Stable background with no motion.

nodes.title: Select Animation Prompt
widgets_values: The character ducks from standing down into a low crouch. The knees bend deeply and the hips sink, the whole body folding and compacting downward, the torso leaning in over the legs and the heavy oversized head lowering toward the ground. It settles into a low, braced, hunkered pose and holds there.

nodes.title: Base Prompt
widgets_values: Edit the reference image to re-pose the same character. Preserve the character's identity exactly as in the reference: the same brain-head shape and gloss; the same distinctive pattern of folds and wrinkles on the brain, kept consistent from every angle as if it were the same physical head simply rotated; the same brain/skin colors; the same eyes; the same clothing and outfit colors; the same footwear; and the same accessories. The character holds the exact same neutral standing pose in every direction — standing upright and still, weight even on both feet, legs straight and together, both stub arms relaxed at the sides. Only the facing direction changes; the pose never changes. Character type: a humanoid figure whose head is a single oversized glossy wrinkled brain on a short brain-stem neck, with a small slim lanky body, thin stub arms, and exaggerated big-head tiny-body proportions.

nodes.title: Frame Prompt
widgets_values: The character holds a ready fighting stance: weight low on staggered feet with knees bent, both thin arms raised in a fists-up guard in front of the chest and head, the lead fist forward and lower and the rear fist tucked in close beside the head. It bobs and sways very gently in place with light, springy, ready energy, shifting its weight subtly between its feet, while both fists stay up and the guard stays intact throughout. The heavy oversized head stays level facing forward to the right. Only this small ready-stance bounce, returning to the starting pose for a seamless loop.
